title: angelphytum arnottii
intro: Angelphytum arnottii, also known as the Argentine fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving muscle and joint pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Angelphytum arnottii is often used as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and it can be found in some traditional remedies, such as teas and topical creams.
